questions.q: A new study on political bias and conspiracy thinking found that almost 80% of highly conspiratorial Republicans endorsed a theory blaming Democratic operatives for a 2024 assassination attempt against whom?
According to newly published research, patients who view their depression or anxiety as a result of what specific cause tend to use antidepressants for much longer periods?
In an April 2026 interview with the BBC, senior Iranian politician Ebrahim Azizi declared that Tehran would 'never' cede control over which strategic waterway?

Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy warned on April 19, 2026, that Russia's crackdown on social media is meant to prevent uprisings ahead of a general mobilization targeting Ukraine and which other region?
Which car rental company recently dropped an almost $10,000 claim against a B.C. couple over alleged diesel damage after evidence showed they pumped regular gasoline?
According to exit polls on April 20, 2026, which pro-Russian former president is set for a landslide victory in Bulgaria's parliamentary elections?
Which former federal environment minister recently blasted the heads of Canadian oil companies, accusing them of "taking us for fools" over rising emissions?

A large-scale study of U.S. youth tracking over 11,000 children found that starting the use of what substance during teenage years is linked to measurably slower cognitive development and impaired memory?
On April 20, 2026, French prosecutors summoned Elon Musk to Paris as part of an investigation into the spread of illegal deepfakes generated by which AI system on X?

In April 2026, which country's defense ministry announced it had sent machines into the battlefield, expanding frontline logistics with a plan to deploy 25,000 ground robots by mid-2026 to replace human soldiers?
